context: Evaluates the creation of a Rails Service Object according to strict conventions: .call pattern, standardized response hash, YARD documentation, error constants, and TDD discipline.

checklist.name: Mandatory Response Contract (Success)
checklist.description: The service returns `{ success: true, response: { order: ... } }` on success.

checklist.name: Mandatory Response Contract (Failure)
checklist.description: The service returns `{ success: false, response: { error: { message: '...' } } }` on failure.

checklist.name: Error Constants
checklist.description: User-facing error messages are defined as constants at the top of the class.

checklist.name: YARD Documentation (self.call)
checklist.description: Includes `@param`, `@return [Hash]`, and `@raise` tags for the `self.call` method.

checklist.name: YARD Documentation (public methods)
checklist.description: Includes `@param`, `@return`, and `@raise` tags for all other public methods.

checklist.name: Module README
checklist.description: An `app/services/orders/README.md` file exists following the required template.

checklist.name: Frozen String Pragma
checklist.description: The service file starts with `# frozen_string_literal: true`.

checklist.name: Proper Namespacing
checklist.description: The class is wrapped in `module Orders` and placed at `app/services/orders/placement_service.rb`.

checklist.name: Error Logging
checklist.description: Rescued errors log both the message AND at least the first 5 lines of the backtrace.

checklist.name: TDD Discipline (Simulated)
checklist.description: The output includes a failing spec created before the implementation (verified via the task sequence).
